title: Resolution Recommendation Output Schema
description: Structured output generated by the Enterprise Resolution Recommendation AI Agent.

recommended_resolution.description: The single best recommended resolution based on the root cause analysis.

recommended_runbook.description: The enterprise runbook that best matches the recommended resolution.

estimated_resolution_time.description: Estimated time required to complete the recommended resolution.

automation_possible.description: Whether the resolution can be executed automatically.

rollback_required.description: Whether rollback is recommended before applying the resolution.

reasoning.description: Explanation of why this resolution was selected.

requires_human_approval.description: Indicates whether the recommendation should be reviewed before execution.
